notes: These are default optional product mappings intended for practitioner review.
Clinical recommendations should remain separate from product recommendations.
Practitioners can duplicate and edit these defaults later in a custom profile.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by digestive, motility, absorption, or gut-environment abnormalities.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be relevant when digestion, absorption, or inflammatory gut patterns appear central.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by repeated nutrient-related abnormalities or broader foundational depletion patterns.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may help when the scan suggests nutritional insufficiency, poor resilience, or a need for deeper foundational support.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by toxic-burden, detoxification, hepatobiliary, or elimination-related abnormalities.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be relevant where the scan suggests exposure burden, sluggish detoxification, or elimination stress.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by allergic, inflammatory, barrier, or skin-reactivity patterns.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be relevant when immune reactivity, dietary triggers, or skin barrier stress appear to overlap.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by metabolic, circulatory, cardiovascular, or resilience-related patterns.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be useful where the scan suggests a broader cardiometabolic support strategy is needed.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by endocrine, thyroid, rhythm, or stress-adaptation related patterns.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be relevant where hormonal rhythm, thyroid balance, or deeper constitutional tendencies need exploration.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by broader resilience, nervous-system, immune, or energy-related abnormalities.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be useful where the scan suggests a whole-system support approach rather than a single narrow intervention.

product_recommendations.rationale: Triggered by mineral balance, structural support, inflammatory bone/joint, or longer-term rebuilding patterns.
product_recommendations.patient_note: These options may be useful where the scan suggests deeper mineral, structural, or constitutional support is warranted.
